visual_description: A static, over-the-shoulder shot shows a young girl with short, dark hair, wearing a striped sweater, sitting at a desk in a dimly lit bedroom. The room is illuminated by a warm lamp on the desk. In the foreground, a white door is visible, with the word "REDRUM" written in red on it. The audio features a high-pitched, childlike voice shouting a phrase repeatedly with frantic and escalating intensity. The voice begins with a loud, almost panicked cry of "Redrum! Redrum!" The camera cuts to a reverse shot, revealing the girl is facing a woman in bed. The woman, with dark hair and a distressed expression, is propped up on her elbows. The girl, still seen from behind, holds a toy sword and points it at the woman. The woman gestures with her free hand as she looks at the girl. The shot remains static, focusing on the tense interaction between the two. The voice then repeats the phrase with increasing speed and desperation, "Redrum! Redrum! Redrum! Redrum!"
